profile.name: Faraja Ahdaf
profile.title: AI & Machine Learning · Data Analysis · Applied AI
profile.tagline: Exploring applied AI, machine learning, and data analysis through practical experiments and research-minded builds.
profile.description: I focus on understanding data, evaluating models, and turning machine learning ideas into small, useful systems. Web development is a supporting skill I use when a project needs an interface.

about.title: Learning by measuring models and data.
about.description: My strongest interest is AI, machine learning, and data analysis. I use web development as a side skill to present experiments, build small tools, and make results easier to understand.
